title: ÜSSAM (Strategic Studies Application and Research Center) miniTDTS'25
content:
ÜSSAM (Strategic Studies Application and Research Center) miniTDTS'25

What is Mini TDTS'25?

The Organization of Turkic States Mini Simulation Program (mini TDTS'25) , which will be held by TESAM Turkey Center for Economic, Political and Strategic Studies in partnership with Üsküdar University , has been created as a unique transformed format of the MUN concept .In our simulation format , where university students participate as delegates of selected countries in this knowledge-filled and interesting concept, it is aimed for the participants to gain a unique experience .

Participants will have the opportunity to show themselves on this academic platform , discover new connections , have a fun and knowledge-filled experience , and earn a certificate that will be included in their CV .
